title: Nooks and Crannies
description: Adds nooks to trees where you can find loot
body:
# Nooks and Crannies
Nooks and Crannies is mod aimed at enhancing the world while remaining close to vanilla.

## Features
### Nooks
![Oak and birch nooks beside a pool of lava.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mLMe1FYN/images/dc5d43032579e98ef62408915902ff391bf2ecf6.png)
Nooks are small hollows in trees found all throughout your world.  Look inside the opening and you might find something useful.  Saplings, feathers, apples, and nuggets are common, but maybe you'll find something else too...

Loot from nooks replenishes over time.
A comparator will detect when a nook has items inside.

Each flavour of log has a corresponding nook which can be obtained with a Silk Touch tool.  Nooks placed by the player will continue to produce items as if they were naturally generated.

## Coming soon

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Crannies - given the name of the mod, you'd expect it to already have these...
- Config settings

</details>

## Technical Info
No block entities - all blocks added by this mod can be used as decoration without affecting performance.

The loot tables of each nook can be individually customised by data packs.
